lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਵੇਖੈ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਚੜੈ ਚਵਗਣ ਵੰਨੁ ॥੪॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak vekhai nadar kar charrai chavagan van |4|2|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Lord shall look upon you with His Glance of Grace, and you shall be blessed with honor four times over. ||4||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੰਨੁ ਬਦੀਆ ਕਰਿ ਧਾਵਣੀ ਤਾ ਕੋ ਆਖੈ ਧੰਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: ban badeea kar dhaavanee taa ko aakhai dhan |
lines.english: Let your work be restraint from sin; only then will people call you blessed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਲ ਕੰਨਿਆ ਕੌ ਬਾਪੁ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਭਾਈ ਕੌ ਅਤਿ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: baal kaniaa kau baap piaaraa bhaaee kau at bhaaee |
lines.english: The father is dear to his son and daughter, and the brother is very dear to his brother.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਃ ੧ ਚਉਤੁਕੇ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 1 chautuke |
lines.english: Sorat'h, First Mehl, Chau-Thukay:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇ ਬਾਪ ਕੋ ਬੇਟਾ ਨੀਕਾ ਸਸੁਰੈ ਚਤੁਰੁ ਜਵਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: maae baap ko bettaa neekaa sasurai chatur javaaee |
lines.english: The son is dear to his mother and father; he is the wise son-in-law to his father-in-law.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੁ ਭਇਆ ਬਾਹਰੁ ਘਰੁ ਛੋਡਿਆ ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਭਈ ਪਰਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: hukam bheaa baahar ghar chhoddiaa khin meh bhee paraaee |
lines.english: By the Order of the Lord's Command, he leaves his house and goes outside, and in an instant, everything becomes alien to him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਦਾਨੁ ਇਸਨਾਨੁ ਨ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਤਿਤੁ ਤਨਿ ਧੂੜਿ ਧੁਮਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naam daan isanaan na manamukh tith tan dhoorr dhumaaee |1|
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh does not remember the Name of the Lord, does not give in charity, and does not cleanse his consciousness; his body rolls in the dust. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਮਾਨਿਆ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਖਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: man maaniaa naam sakhaaee |
lines.english: The mind is comforted by the Comforter of the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਇ ਪਰਉ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੈ ਜਿਨਿ ਸਾਚੀ ਬੂਝ ਬੁਝਾਈ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: paae prau gur kai balihaarai jin saachee boojh bujhaaee | rahaau |
lines.english: I fall at the Guru's feet - I am a sacrifice to Him; He has given me to understand the true understanding. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਗ ਸਿਉ ਝੂਠ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਮਨੁ ਬੇਧਿਆ ਜਨ ਸਿਉ ਵਾਦੁ ਰਚਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jag siau jhootth preet man bedhiaa jan siau vaad rachaaee |
lines.english: The mind is impressed with the false love of the world; he quarrels with the Lord's humble servant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮਗਨੁ ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਮਗੁ ਜੋਹੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਲੇਵੈ ਮਰੈ ਬਿਖੁ ਖਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa magan ahinis mag johai naam na levai marai bikh khaaee |
lines.english: Infatuated with Maya, night and day, he sees only the worldly path; he does not chant the Naam, and drinking poison, he dies.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੰਧਣ ਵੈਣਿ ਰਤਾ ਹਿਤਕਾਰੀ ਸਬਦੈ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਨ ਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: gandhan vain rataa hitakaaree sabadai surat na aaee |
lines.english: He is imbued and infatuated with vicious talk; the Word of the Shabad does not come into his consciousness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਸਭਾ ਮਹਿ ਸਹਜੁ ਨ ਚਾਖਿਆ ਜਿਹਬਾ ਰਸੁ ਨਹੀ ਰਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: saadh sabhaa meh sehaj na chaakhiaa jihabaa ras nahee raaee |
lines.english: He does not enjoy celestial peace in the Company of the Holy, and there is not even a bit of sweetness on his tongue.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੰਗਿ ਨ ਰਾਤਾ ਰਸਿ ਨਹੀ ਬੇਧਿਆ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਪਤਿ ਗਵਾਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: rang na raataa ras nahee bedhiaa manamukh pat gavaaee |2|
lines.english: He is not imbued with the Lord's Love, and he is not impressed by the taste of the Name; the self-willed manmukh loses his honor. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਖੀ ਮੀਟਿ ਚਲਿਆ ਅੰਧਿਆਰਾ ਘਰੁ ਦਰੁ ਦਿਸੈ ਨ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: akhee meett chaliaa andhiaaraa ghar dar disai na bhaaee |
lines.english: Closing his eyes, he walks in darkness; he cannot see the home of his own being, O Siblings of Destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਧਨੁ ਅਪੁਨਾ ਕਰਿ ਜਾਨਿਆ ਦਰ ਕੀ ਖਬਰਿ ਨ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: man tan dhan apunaa kar jaaniaa dar kee khabar na paaee |
lines.english: He calls his mind, body and wealth his own; he has no knowledge of the Court of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮ ਦਰਿ ਬਾਧਾ ਠਉਰ ਨ ਪਾਵੈ ਅਪੁਨਾ ਕੀਆ ਕਮਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jam dar baadhaa tthaur na paavai apunaa keea kamaaee |3|
lines.english: Tied up at Death's door, he finds no place of rest; he receives the rewards of his own actions. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਤਾ ਅਖੀ ਵੇਖਾ ਕਹਣਾ ਕਥਨੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: nadar kare taa akhee vekhaa kahanaa kathan na jaaee |
lines.english: When the Lord casts His Glance of Grace, then I see Him with my own eyes; He is indescribable, and cannot be described.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੰਨੀ ਸੁਣਿ ਸੁਣਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਲਾਹੀ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਵਸਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: kanee sun sun sabad salaahee amrit ridai vasaaee |
lines.english: With my ears, I continually listen to the Word of the Shabad, and I praise Him; His Ambrosial Name abides within my heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰ ਵਿਣੁ ਭਰਮੁ ਨ ਭਾਗੈ ਸਚਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥੪॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak gur vin bharam na bhaagai sach naam vaddiaaee |4|3|
lines.english: O Nanak, without the Guru, doubt is not dispelled; through the True Name, glorious greatness is obtained. ||4||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਭਉ ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰੁ ਨਿਰਵੈਰੁ ਪੂਰਨ ਜੋਤਿ ਸਮਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: nirbhau nirankaar niravair pooran jot samaaee |
lines.english: He is Fearless, Formless and absolutely without vengeance; I am absorbed in His Perfect Light.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ਦੁਤੁਕੇ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 1 dutuke |
lines.english: Sorat'h, First Mehl, Dho-Thukay:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੁੜੁ ਧਰਤੀ ਪੁੜੁ ਪਾਣੀ ਆਸਣੁ ਚਾਰਿ ਕੁੰਟ ਚਉਬਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: purr dharatee purr paanee aasan chaar kuntt chaubaaraa |
lines.english: In the realm of land, and in the realm of water, Your seat is the chamber of the four directions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਭਵਣ ਕੀ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਏਕਾ ਮੁਖਿ ਤੇਰੈ ਟਕਸਾਲਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sagal bhavan kee moorat ekaa mukh terai ttakasaalaa |1|
lines.english: Yours is the one and only form of the entire universe; Your mouth is the mint to fashion all. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲਿ ਥਲਿ ਮਹੀਅਲਿ ਭਰਿਪੁਰਿ ਲੀਣਾ ਆਪੇ ਸਰਬ ਸਮਾਣਾ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jal thal maheeal bharipur leenaa aape sarab samaanaa | rahaau |
lines.english: You are pervading and permeating the water, the land and the sky; You Yourself are contained in all. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਸਾਹਿਬਾ ਤੇਰੇ ਚੋਜ ਵਿਡਾਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: mere saahibaa tere choj viddaanaa |
lines.english: O my Lord Master, Your play is so wonderful!

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਜਹ ਦੇਖਾ ਤਹ ਜੋਤਿ ਤੁਮਾਰੀ ਤੇਰਾ ਰੂਪੁ ਕਿਨੇਹਾ ॥
lines.translit: jeh jeh dekhaa teh jot tumaaree teraa roop kinehaa |
lines.english: Wherever I look, there I see Your Light, but what is Your form?

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਤੁ ਰੂਪਿ ਫਿਰਹਿ ਪਰਛੰਨਾ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਕਿਸ ਹੀ ਜੇਹਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: eikat roop fireh parachhanaa koe na kis hee jehaa |2|
lines.english: You have one form, but it is unseen; there is none like any other. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਡਜ ਜੇਰਜ ਉਤਭੁਜ ਸੇਤਜ ਤੇਰੇ ਕੀਤੇ ਜੰਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: anddaj jeraj utabhuj setaj tere keete jantaa |
lines.english: The beings born of eggs, born of the womb, born of the earth and born of sweat, all are created by You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੁ ਪੁਰਬੁ ਮੈ ਤੇਰਾ ਦੇਖਿਆ ਤੂ ਸਭਨਾ ਮਾਹਿ ਰਵੰਤਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: ek purab mai teraa dekhiaa too sabhanaa maeh ravantaa |3|
lines.english: I have seen one glory of Yours, that You are pervading and permeating in all. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੇ ਗੁਣ ਬਹੁਤੇ ਮੈ ਏਕੁ ਨ ਜਾਣਿਆ ਮੈ ਮੂਰਖ ਕਿਛੁ ਦੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: tere gun bahute mai ek na jaaniaa mai moorakh kichh deejai |
lines.english: Your Glories are so numerous, and I do not know even one of them; I am such a fool - please, give me some of them!

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਪਾਪੀ ਪਤਿਤੁ ਪਰਮ ਪਾਖੰਡੀ ਤੂ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: hau paapee patit param paakhanddee too niramal nirankaaree |
lines.english: I am a wicked sinner and a great hypocrite; You are the Immaculate and Formless Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਣਵਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੁਣਿ ਮੇਰੇ ਸਾਹਿਬਾ ਡੁਬਦਾ ਪਥਰੁ ਲੀਜੈ ॥੪॥੪॥
lines.translit: pranavat naanak sun mere saahibaa ddubadaa pathar leejai |4|4|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, listen, O my Lord Master: I am sinking like a stone - please, save me! ||4||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Sorat'h, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਚਾਖਿ ਪਰਮ ਰਸਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਸਰਣਿ ਤੁਮਾਰੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: amrit chaakh param ras raate tthaakur saran tumaaree |1|
lines.english: Tasting the Ambrosial Nectar, I am imbued with supreme bliss; O Lord and Master, I seek Your Sanctuary. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਪੂਰਾ ਹਮ ਊਰੇ ਹੋਛੇ ਤੂ ਗਉਰਾ ਹਮ ਹਉਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: too pooraa ham aoore hochhe too gauraa ham haure |
lines.english: You are perfect, while I am worthless and imperfect. You are profound, while I am trivial.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਣੁ ਮਹਤੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਨੁ ਪਲੈ ਸਾਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਮਾਣੇ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: maan mehat naam dhan palai saachai sabad samaane | rahaau |
lines.english: In my lap is the honor and glory of the wealth of the Name; I merge into the True Word of the Shabad. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਤਾ ਤੂ ਮੈ ਮਾਣੁ ਨਿਮਾਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: karataa too mai maan nimaane |
lines.english: O Creator Lord, You are the honor of the dishonored.
